impact: The daemon already rolls back invalid Python, but repeated failures show the worker needs durable, in-repo repair instructions that enter its prompt context. This guide directs the next cycle toward smaller Python changes, plain Python annotations, fixture-first validation, and avoiding the exact invalid TypeScript-style constructs that caused the stalled replenishment task.
summary: Add explicit supervisor repair guidance and validation for repeated PP&D daemon syntax-preflight failures.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 3 consecutive daemon rounds failed without an accepted patch

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
